full_suite.failure_notes: One failure is attributable to this exact-name CLI: the shared scaffold indexer does not categorize event_sequence filenames. Fixing it requires editing a shared file forbidden by this NEW-FILES-ONLY lane. The other 27 failures are unrelated court-fixture drift, sandbox-blocked socket tests, overlapping-court sample drift, and an unrelated untracked PB replay video triggering storage policy.

honest_issues: No real dense-rally DP score was possible locally because the pulled artifact lacks per-frame scores, timestamps/types, and rally spans; staged manifest media is absent.
The step-16918 threshold-0.05 output fails the pre-DP physical-rate gate, so DP must not launder it.
The full suite is not green due to one lane-attributable scaffold categorization failure plus 27 unrelated failures.
VERIFIED=0, default OFF, no product wiring, and no best-stack change remain binding.
next: Have the integration owner categorize apply_event_sequence_dp in the shared scaffold indexer, then execute VM_EVAL_STEP.md. Stop without judge tuning if the raw rate remains outside 0.3–1.0 events/s.
